productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Light Winters Blue Shirts
description: CompositionLight blue shirt made of 100% cotton, has cut-away collars with a front buttoned placket, full arm cuff sleeves and a curved hemline  FittingComfort  Wash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery  Take formal dressing to the next level with this shirt from united colors of benetton. The subdued blue colour suits all occasions, and the cotton fabric is sure to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with light brown formal pants and leather shoes for a formal look, or with jeans and brown suede shoes for a semi-formal touché .  Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-5'11", Shoulders-18"
